name: JEWETT CAMERON TRADING CO LTD
business: Jewett-Cameron Trading Company Ltd. designs, sources, and distributes outdoor living products including fencing, pet supplies, and sustainable bags to home improvement retailers and consumers. It also distributes industrial wood products for the transportation industry through its Greenwood subsidiary. The company previously operated a seed processing business which was closed in fiscal 2023.
sellsTo: transportation industry (transit buses, motor coaches, light rail, boats)

exposures.sentence: The Company’s mission is to improve the lives of professionals and do-it-yourselfers with innovative products that enrich outdoor spaces.
Fencing represents our largest product line.
Our Sustainable and Post-Consumer Recycled (PCR) bag products are sold under the MyEcoWorld brand.
On October 15, 2025, we learned that a threat actor had gained unauthorized access to portions of our information technology (IT) environment.

catalysts.sentence: The line was renewed in June 2025 and now expires on June 30, 2026.
